# v0.1.15

## Highlights

- Added `/extensions`, `/mcp`, and `/skills` inside interactive chat so users can discover installed capabilities without leaving the session.
- Added extension counts to the TUI session strip and slash-command completion.
- Kept the TUI sidebar quieter by preserving last-run action visibility while surfacing extension status compactly.

## Verification

- `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
